creator: Alexander88207@protonmail.com
text:
Hello,

drm-kmod is the friendly meta package that installs the recommended DRM version based on the given OSVERSION along with gpu-firmware-kmod.

Going to install an certain version by hand is more an advanced way and let the use choose which gpu-firmware a user wants to install.

However, it became more common that people dont have gpu-firmware installed in that case and do run into a freeze in the "loading modules" phase for example.

I would recommend to leave a hint about that at least as a pkg install-message that those ports do not pull gpu-firmware.
